category_sources: GitHub README says par2cmdline is a PAR 2.0 compatible file verification and repair tool.
source_facts.description says "Parchive: Parity Archive Volume Set for data recovery".
display_name_sources: GitHub repository is Parchive/par2cmdline and README heading is par2cmdline.
docs_sources: GitHub README documents the project and links to parchive.github.io for more information from the original authors.
Repository has an official Wiki link available in GitHub navigation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Parchive/par2cmdline, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: GitHub README says par2cmdline is for PAR 2.0 file verification and repair.
source_facts.executables lists par2, par2create, par2repair, and par2verify.
